_meta.description: Project task tracker. AI appends and updates tasks via push; humans update status directly in Sheets. Pull to sync human edits back to this file.

tasks.title: Define project scope and budget envelope
tasks.notes: Establish total available capital, target sq footage, and must-have features. This unlocks all downstream decisions.

tasks.title: Set up Google credentials and run init_sheet.py
tasks.notes: Follow docs/setup.md. One-time setup per machine. Run init_sheet.py to create the Google Sheet.

tasks.title: Get contractor estimates for key line items
tasks.notes: Contact 2-3 local contractors for ballpark estimates. Update scenario JSON files with real numbers.
